examples.eng: It's exactly 3 o'clock.
Is it 5 o'clock already?
It's only eight o'clock.
Prayers are at 8 o'clock.
He went out at 11 o'clock.
Ten o'clock is good for me.
The call is for 11 o'clock.
It's just on three o'clock.
He has a 10 o'clock curfew.
examples.ru: К десяти часам вечера он обязан быть дома.

examples.eng: Lessons start at 9 o'clock.
I'll be done by five o'clock.
examples.ru: Я буду готов к пяти часам.

examples.eng: School lets out at 3 o'clock.
examples.ru: Занятия в школе заканчиваются в три часа.

examples.eng: It's eleven o'clock at night.
The film starts at 5 o'clock.
The film starts at 8 o'clock.
They quit work at one o'clock.
examples.ru: Они заканчивают работу в час дня.

examples.eng: She arrived home at 7 o'clock.
examples.ru: Она приехала домой в семь часов.

examples.eng: He arrived home at six o'clock.
examples.ru: Он пришёл домой в шесть часов.

examples.eng: I'll call for you at 8 o'clock.
examples.ru: Я зайду за тобой в восемь часов.

examples.eng: Be there at four o'clock sharp.
examples.ru: Будь там ровно в четыре часа.

examples.eng: I'll come for you at 8 o'clock.
examples.ru: Я зайду за тобой в 8 часов.

examples.eng: We'll be dining at six o'clock.
examples.ru: Мы будем ужинать в шесть часов.

examples.eng: I asked for a 6 o'clock wake-up.
examples.ru: Я попросил, чтобы меня разбудили в шесть.

examples.eng: It's three o'clock in Tokyo now.
I've invited them for 9 o'clock.
examples.ru: Я пригласил их на девять часов.

examples.eng: It is getting on for two o'clock.
I requested a taxi for 8 o'clock.
It's four o'clock in the morning.
I usually get off at six o'clock.
examples.ru: Я обычно выхожу в шесть часов.

examples.eng: I've set the alarm for 7 o'clock.
